allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **d.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; keys=[k for k in deps if ''navigation'' in k or ''bottom-tabs'' in k or ''expo-router'' in k or ''react-native-screens'' in k]; [print\(k, deps[k]\) for k in sorted\(keys\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **d.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; [print\(k, deps[k]\) for k in sorted\(deps\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\(''peerDependencies'',{}\); [print\(k,deps[k]\) for k in deps if ''navigation'' in k or ''screens'' in k]")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; console.log\(''react-native-svg:'', deps[''react-native-svg''] || ''NOT FOUND''\); console.log\(''ionicons:'', deps[''@expo/vector-icons''] || ''NOT FOUND''\);")
